I

initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class com.example.demo2.controller.SudokuController
 
isBoardValid() - Method in class com.example.demo2.model.SudokuBoard
Checks whether the current board state is valid according to Sudoku rules.
isComplete() - Method in class com.example.demo2.model.SudokuBoard
Checks whether the board is complete.
isFixedCell(int, int) - Method in class com.example.demo2.model.SudokuBoard
Checks whether a cell is fixed (not editable by the user).
isGameWon() - Method in class com.example.demo2.model.SudokuBoard
Checks whether the game has been won (board complete and valid).
isValidNumber(int) - Method in class com.example.demo2.model.SudokuBoard
Checks whether a number is valid for a 6x6 Sudoku.
isValidPosition(int, int) - Method in class com.example.demo2.model.SudokuBoard
Checks whether a position is valid within the board.
IView - Interface in com.example.demo2.view
Interfaz que define el contrato básico para las vistas de la aplicación.
